level.testConsent: This test banner isn't part of the real game: it only exists to validate the level contract (onWin / onLose / countdown) before the 12 real levels are built.

ranking.title: Ranking
ranking.empty: No records yet. Be the first!

info.title: Information
info.objective: The goal is simple: accept every cookie category across all 12 levels. The only problem? The interface disagrees.
info.rules: Each level lasts 100 seconds, and the clock never stops. Lose once, and you'll be sent back to Level 1. Don't worry though—your best score is always saved under your username.

win.outro: You can now continue to the next category.
win.outroFinal: You have accepted every cookie category.

lose.message:
You rejected the cookie preferences.

Your progress has been reset.

Click below to return to the Level Selection screen and start again from Level 1.
